_comment: litellm context/cost metadata for the locally-served vLLM models so aider stops warning 'Unknown context window size' and sizes prompts correctly. Coding sessions serve at 32K (run_coding_agent.sh MAX_MODEL_LEN=32768). Split leaves output headroom so prompt+max_tokens never overflows max-model-len. Cost is 0 here (billing is in SU, handled by the gateway/metering, not litellm). Keys are duplicated with and without the 'openai/' provider prefix because aider/litellm may look up either form.
